resource.directId: {resource} resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
resource.vid: Version id for vread — use with action=vread and _id
resource.since: Only include versions created at or after this date/dateTime (history)
resource.at: Only include versions current at this instant (history)
resource.body: Full FHIR resource JSON for create/update, or JSON Patch array (RFC 6902) for patch
resource.actionHintHistory: history optionally takes _id for instance history
operate.title: Execute Operation
operate.descriptionPrefix: Invoke a FHIR named operation. Available operations:
operate.descriptionSuffix: . Call capabilities for full parameter details.
operate.operation: Operation catalog key (e.g. everything, lastn, validate, docref). Leading $ is optional.
operate.resourceType: FHIR resource type — required for polymorphic operations like $validate
operate.id: Resource ID — required for instance-level operations like $everything
operate.body: FHIR JSON body for POST operations (e.g. resource to validate)
operate.fhirpath: FHIRPath expression for client-side projection of the response
